prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L TDV6 (306DT) diesel with a Garrett GT2260V turbo upgrade to GTD2056V, supporting 320hp and 650Nm torque via a custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ with upgraded intercooler and 3.5" downpipe)
Suspension: Bilstein B14 PSS9 coilovers with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (25mm drop) and polybushings from SuperPro (part SPF1049K) for improved off-road articulation and on-road handling

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differential (part QDF7S) in the rear axle with a reinforced transfer case (ZF 6HP28A) tuned by JE Motorsport for quicker shifts and a custom 4.10:1 gear ratio swap for better low-end torque
estetica: Aero: Overland-style front bumper from ARB (part 3510020) with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch and Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (30" 180W)
Wheels: Method MR701 VT-Spec wheels (18x9 +12mm offset) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/65R18) with custom black powder-coated Land Rover center caps

Exterior: Full de-badging with vinyl-wrapped roof in 3M Matte Carbon Black (1080 series), combined with a custom rear diffuser from Mantec 4x4 (part LR04-001) and side steps from Mantec (part LR04-003) in raw aluminum finish
